title: Loops
description: for, while, and how to break/continue.

questions.prompt: How many times does it log?
How many times does it log?
How many times does it log?
questions.explanation: do-while runs at least once before checking the condition.
break exits the loop entirely at i=3.
continue skips the rest of THIS iteration and jumps to the next.

questions.prompt: Which loop is BEST when you need the index while iterating an array?
questions.explanation: Classic for exposes the index directly. arr.forEach((v, i) => ...) also works.

questions.prompt: What is the FINAL value logged?

questions.code:
let x = 0;
for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) x += i;
